ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographic region of the country */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density (people per square kilometer) */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language(s) of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the statistics */,
  "total_population" REAL /* Total population */,
  "female_population" REAL /* Female population */,
  "male_population" REAL /* Male population */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* Age distribution (e.g., 0-14, 15-64, 65+) */,
  "urban_population" REAL /* Urban population percentage */,
  "rural_population" REAL /* Rural population percentage */,
  "life_expectancy" REAL /* Life expectancy at birth (years) */,
  "infant_mortality_rate" REAL /* Infant mortality rate (per 1,000 live births) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_statistics_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_statistics" (
  "emp_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment statistic entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the statistics */,
  "employment_in_industry" REAL /* Employment in industry (%) */,
  "employment_in_agriculture" REAL /* Employment in agriculture (%) */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate (%) */,
  "employment_in_services" REAL /* Employment in services (%) */,
  "labor_force_participation_rate" REAL /* Labor force participation rate (%) */,
  "youth_unemployment_rate" REAL /* Youth unemployment rate (%) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("emp_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_statistics_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "econ_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the statistics */,
  "gdp" REAL /* GDP in USD */,
  "national_income_per_capita" REAL /* National income per capita */,
  "net_income_from_abroad" REAL /* Net income from abroad */,
  "inflation_rate" REAL /* Inflation rate (%) */,
  "debt_to_gdp_ratio" REAL /* Debt to GDP ratio (%) */,
  "trade_balance" REAL /* Trade balance (exports - imports) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("econ_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_indicators_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_consumption" (
  "energy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy consumption statistic entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the statistics */,
  "electric_power_consumption" REAL /* Electric power consumption (kWH per capita) */,
  "renewable_energy_consumption" REAL /* Renewable energy consumption (%) */,
  "fossil_fuel_consumption" REAL /* Fossil fuel consumption (%) */,
  "nuclear_energy_consumption" REAL /* Nuclear energy consumption (%) */,
  "hydropower_consumption" REAL /* Hydropower consumption (%) */,
  "solar_energy_consumption" REAL /* Solar energy consumption (%) */,
  "wind_energy_consumption" REAL /* Wind energy consumption (%) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("energy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_consumption_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., annual, quarterly, special) */,
  "generated_by_user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each statistic entry
Unique identifier for each employment statistic entry
Unique identifier for each economic indicator entry
Unique identifier for each energy consumption statistic entry
Date when the report was generated
Type of the report (e.g., annual, quarterly, special)
User ID of the user who generated the report
Date when the report was last updated
Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin)
Last login date of the user
Date when the user account was created
